They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another bunch of challenges for the celebrities, as a result of which Joanna Page does something startling with a pineapple, Armando Iannucci does something confusing with a nursery rhyme and Amy Gledhill does something unexpected with balls of ice. As if that wasn't enough, Kumail Nanjiani reveals his missing body part. Greg Davies dishes out the points

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. A Segway race helps whip up the guests' competitive spirit, Donna gets emotional when her work-life balance is questioned, and chef David proves he can handle the unexpected at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. Swallows Rest is first up and hosts Jane and Keith want to find out about Ray's colour preferences. Next Darren and James of the Burley Inn quiz Ray over his fussiness around their pine furniture. When it comes to the Silverton, B&B team Donna and David take umbrage with Jane and Keith's comments

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a gnarly chicken pie

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Durham compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with Steph and James, who offer a night of gastropub favourites. Day two sees animal-lovers Gary and Amanda serve up two courses of fish on their homely-menu, and hosts Andy and Emma feel confident on the final night of the competition

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie tries to expand her social life by going out with her work colleagues, so Doug resorts to crude tactics to scare them off. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny use Arthur as a means of attracting women

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Danny comes down with lockjaw and Doug fritters away money on his credit card. Meanwhile, Arthur takes on front-desk duties at the senior centre, where he comes into conflict with the pudding seller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur tries to persuade Doug to be his partner in the senior centre's shuffleboard tournament - but doesn't bargain on him being hopeless at the game. Meanwhile, Carrie pretends to be ill in an effort to get Holly to cook for her

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Holly is evicted from her flat, so Arthur offers to let her move into the basement - and Doug soon realises the benefits of having another woman around. With Kevin James, Jerry Stiller and Nicole Sullivan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert and Amy finally get married in the Barone family tradition. Brad Garrett and Monica Horan star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains she and Ray do not have any fun together - and persuades him to let her join him in his game of golf. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to gain the upper hand in her relationship with new daughter-in-law Amy, but Debra is determined the latest Barone wife will not endure the kind of interference she has had to put up with

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Samantha ends her relationship with Frasier on their return from a seemingly perfect weekend away, leaving him desperate to find out where he went wrong. However, Niles helps him realise that he only liked his new woman for her famous friends. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A story about the holiday season is told from the perspectives of Daphne, Niles, Martin and Roz as the Crane family prepares for Christmas. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: A British theme pub becomes Frasier's favourite new haunt - much to the annoyance of Daphne, who is already a regular and dislikes having to share the place with her boss. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart falls in love with the Reverend Lovejoy's daughter Jessica, but she spoils his dreams of romance by stealing the church collection plate and standing by as he takes the blame. Featuring the guest voice of Meryl Streep

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes up ice hockey and proves so good at the game that she completely transforms her ailing team's fortunes. Dismayed at being outshone by a girl, Bart tries to compensate by becoming a teacher's pet - only to be beaten up by bullies

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family visits a theme park based on Bart and Lisa's favourite TV cartoon The Itchy & Scratchy Show - but Homer is arrested, the kids are mischievous and the mechanised attractions go berserk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: $pringfield (Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Legalised Gambling)
programme.desc: Mr Burns decides to open a casino in Springfield, and it is not before long Marge is bitten by the gambling bug - much to the dismay of her family. Animated comedy, with the guest voices of Gerry Cooney and Robert Goulet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to community-owned B&B The Gun at Ridsdale. A visit to a birds of prey centre results in one guest's feathery hat getting some special attention

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals go glamping at the Marthrown of Mabie site tucked away in a forest in Dumfries, where hosts Mike and Pam hope their guests will embrace the off-grid experience. Unfortunately, Louise and Kerry quickly find the loos to be bog standard, and get buzzed off by some uninvited guests in their accommodation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals are in the village of Holmrook in Cumbria, where Jo and Craig host at their Dale View B&B. The scenery is spectacular, but Kerry and Louise can't dust off their cleanliness concerns. After an afternoon aboard a steam train touring the Cumbrian hills, the guests bond over a few drinks. But Jo is left kicking herself after a poached egg disaster the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to the Cross Inn in Heptonstall, West Yorkshire. Eccentric hosts Gig and Lyndsey hope to impress with their 'one-of-a-kind' style. The B&Bers take it easy with a canal boat tour of the nearby waterways, before they're served gin by a giant sloth at Gig's gig venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day arrives, and with some sore feelings festering, the B&Bers are ready to dish out the dirt on their competitors. Louise and Kerry want to know why Jo and Craig didn't like their B&B. Jo and Craig want to know why Louise and Kerry didn't like their B&B

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In Denmark, George meets a young couple tackling the enormous task of turning a derelict water pumping station into a luxury holiday home. Meanwhile, a dedicated outdoor swimmer builds himself a futurist micro camper. George and Will come up with a novel way to pick the colours for their elegant sky cabin, Will Hardie visits a glamping pod built in an upturned boat, and George visits one up a tree in a Danish forest

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In south London, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for a flat for first-time buyers Adam and Nicole, and a townhouse for world-record-holding rower Kat. Adam and Nicole live with their respective parents and need help to get them living together under the same roof but their home patch has become a pricey part of town, so they've saved for their entire adult lives to get a large enough deposit. They're nervous about spending all that hard-saved cash, but Kirstie manages to find them some hard-to-resist homes. In 2019 Kat was diagnosed with cancer. After going through chemotherapy and being told she was in remission she wanted a new focus, so she joined an all-female trio for an Atlantic rowing challenge. They beat the previous world record by more than seven days, and Kat's next challenge is to put down roots with a townhouse in her beloved south London. Even with a budget of over a million pounds, Phil finds it tough to hit everything on her wishlist in the top spots where she wants to live but once they manage to focus her search on Greenwich, things start to fall into place. A house with potential tugs at Kat's heart

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with Paul and Vic in the Yorkshire village of Clifford to see if they decided to sell their home or renovate it. Back in 2018, Kirstie and Phil visited to see if they could help the couple make a decision, providing them with a plan to renovate with their budget of £42,000 and showing them a number of other houses that would work well for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Staff and volunteers go to extremes to make a success of the railway's steam gala, transporting a 60-tonne locomotive more than 300 miles from the Isle of Wight to Yorkshire. Plus, a historic tram and a vintage steam crane are put into action

programme.title: Shergar: The Racehorse and the IRA
programme.desc: Investigation into the theft of the world's most valuable racehorse in 1983, and its place in the turbulent backdrop of the Troubles in Northern Ireland, when the IRA may have sought funds through ransom demands. Featuring first-hand accounts and compelling historical context to uncover the shocking collision of politics, crime and sport

programme.title: Wrath of Man (2021)
programme.desc: A newly employed security guard gets off to a rocky start with his colleagues, but when he uses exceptional marksmanship skills to foil a robbery, they are left wondering what his background really is. While they fear he may be an inside man for a criminal gang, his mission of revenge slowly comes to light. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Holt McCallany and Andy Garcia

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Costumier Scott usually hides behind the drag queen Casta Hex, but tonight he's shedding his alter ego as he sits down with George, who may strut in like a catwalk star, but hasn't dated in five years. Former Olympian Simon and 60-year-old stable manager Louise are both seeking love later in life, while disco queen Priscilla and bhangra-loving accountant Raj both want fun, but can their musical tastes mix? Twenty-three-year-old Jack is feeling nervous about his blind date and hopes he can find some common ground with Rachella

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Comedy starring Sam Campbell. A hotshot director scours the country for everyday people with feature film ideas before racing against the clock to turn the idea into reality in just three days. Sam and his elite team set about bringing Mick Hall's incomprehensible concept - featuring a detective and real snakes - to the big screen. But it turns out that some people don't make good actors, and snakes have a tendency to bite

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: The residents of Smiling Spring Care Home want to make a sci-fi epic about a group of retirees who go inside a computer to defeat online scammers. But the shoot goes sideways when Pat makes moves on a wealthy resident, Winnie gets challenged to a fight and Jess discovers that she's truly terrible with old people

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend a confectionery convention, where they plan to make off with lots of free sweets. Unfortunately, Homer's love of candy results in him being wrongly accused of sexual harassment by the family's babysitter and smeared by the media. Featuring the guest voice of Dennis Franz (NYPD Blue)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: $pringfield (Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Legalised Gambling)
programme.desc: Mr Burns decides to open a casino in Springfield, and it is not before long Marge is bitten by the gambling bug - much to the dismay of her family. Animated comedy, with the guest voices of Gerry Cooney and Robert Goulet

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Lisa takes up ice hockey and proves so good at the game that she completely transforms her ailing team's fortunes. Dismayed at being outshone by a girl, Bart tries to compensate by becoming a teacher's pet - only to be beaten up by bullies

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family visits a theme park based on Bart and Lisa's favourite TV cartoon The Itchy & Scratchy Show - but Homer is arrested, the kids are mischievous and the mechanised attractions go berserk

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug tries to get into Carrie's good books so she will let him take a trip to Las Vegas with his friends, and Arthur visits a casino. Kevin James stars, with Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie becomes a team leader at her new job, which entails working on Saturdays. A jealous Doug asks his own boss for a promotion too - but is not happy with what he is given. Meanwhile, Arthur suspects the pair of having fun without him. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug reluctantly agrees to join a support group for overeaters - but sneaks off to hide in an abusive relationship meeting instead. However, his scam is exposed when he not only gains weight, but becomes terrified of Carrie

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, causing Ray to wonder whether he is trying to avoid something. Determined to discover the truth, he deprives the youngster of television, comics and video games to sweat the answer out of him through sheer boredom

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray grow irritated by Robert and Amy's over-the-top displays of affection - especially when the pair start giving them relationship advice. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Gianni is hired to do some work on the kitchen, but infuriates Debra with his laziness. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Jon Manfrellotti and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink has to choose whether to return to his heartless former agent Bebe, or stick with his current representative, well-meaning but ineffectual Ben. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink takes everyone to a ski lodge for a weekend break, but wires are crossed and everyone gets the wrong impression about one another. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith (Bebe Neuwirth) arrives out of the blue and tries to rekindle her relationship with Frasier. He manages to resist her charms, but Niles is not as strong-willed. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Boyzone, Priya Kansara, Michael Ball, Celyn Jones and Anna Dimitriadis. With music from Freya Ridings

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend a confectionery convention, where they plan to make off with lots of free sweets. Unfortunately, Homer's love of candy results in him being wrongly accused of sexual harassment by the family's babysitter and smeared by the media. Featuring the guest voice of Dennis Franz (NYPD Blue)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Brothers Peter and David share a home in Wolverhampton and have decided to jointly buy a holiday home in the Spanish town of Torrevieja. With a budget of £100,000, they want a home that not only ticks all their boxes but also suits their large extended family too, so turn to Jean Johansson for advice

programme.title: Women's FA Cup
programme.sub-title: Brighton & Hove Albion v Manchester City
programme.desc: Brighton & Hove Albion v Manchester City (Kick-off 3.00pm). Jill Scott and Maisie Adam present all the action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium. Both teams came back from 2-0 down in their semi-finals to win 3-2, with Brighton prevailing thanks to Nadine Noordam's winner against Liverpool in the fifth minute of stoppage time. Bunny Shaw was the hero in her side's clash with Chelsea as the double-chasing Citizens left it even later, first sending the match into extra time and then scoring the decisive goal

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George follows more of the most eccentric, ambitious and passionate self-builders he's ever met. He also attempts to create an elegant airborne cabin from an old industrial scissor lift and heads to Denmark, home of gorgeous and minimalist architecture. In this episode, a young couple challenge themselves to fit a camper on the back of a tiny Italian Tuk-Tuk, and a father of two boys creates a quirky getaway in an abandoned nuclear bunker. Meanwhile, George and Will Hardie create lightweight furniture for their sky cabin, with mixed results

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond welcome Dermot O'Leary, Greg James, Fern Brady and Mel B to the tent, as they put their baking skills to the test, under the watchful eyes of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The celebs take on iced buns in the Signature, a family classic in the Technical and a Showstopper where they create their celebrity doppelganger in biscuit form

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Discovery Princess cruisers enjoy Alaska's Endicott Arm fjord and a spot of whale watching, while the Diamond Princess passengers have a mindful meander to Busan's Buddhist temple. . Meanwhile, in Montenegro, another ship in the fleet has docked in Bar, where passengers travel by small boat from the historic coastal town of Perast to an iconic offshore islet that is home to a collection of spectacular artworks

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Drama written by Russell T Davies, about a bar owner in Manchester's gay village who becomes embroiled in a feud with his long-standing neighbour. Leo fights to defend the safety of one of his bar staff, while his next-door neighbour Clive is searching for work, and realises Leo might be the answer to all of his problems. Starring Alan Cumming and David Morrissey

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Annie and Jack get more than they bargained for when they try to move on some drunken revellers who have been ejected from a bar. Manny carries out a welfare check after police receive a concerned call from an ex-partner. And Fran and Matt attend a suspected spikinafter receiving reports that a woman has collapsed inside a pub

programme.title: Lion (2016)
programme.desc: A five-year-old Indian boy is adopted by an Australian couple after getting lost hundreds of kilometers from home. 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family. Drama based on the biographical book A Long Way Home by Saroo Brierley, starring Dev Patel, Nicole Kidman and Rooney Mara

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Anna's confidence is knocked when she is urged to reconsider her decision. David is still firmly in denial and starts to withdraw from the people closest to him. But when the church choir beach trip throws them into close proximity, Anna and David are forced to face some uncomfortable truths and secrets spill out. Romantic drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: David tries to make amends while a guarded Anna attempts to keep her distance, and a series of uncomfortable encounters leaves her questioning whether she has made the right choice. David is faced with a difficult congregant and must confront some demons of his own

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from the series in which Sarah and her family tackle the ambitious new-build project of creating a classic country house from scratch

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize, beginning with beautician Rachael and her partner Nick, who prepare a selection of dishes they've never made before. Dionne and Ameel prepare an Indian-inspired meal on the second night of the competition, before Angela and Jeff hope their no-nonsense menu can secure them the money

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca and Lilith throw a party for Carla after she becomes depressed at the prospect of becoming a grandmother. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The gang declares war on the staff of rival bar Gary's Old Town Tavern, who have taken the liberty of stealing a prized trophy from Cheers. Ted Danson and George Wendt star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Woody argue over who can kiss Rebecca for three seconds. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.desc: The family visits a theme park based on Bart and Lisa's favourite TV cartoon The Itchy & Scratchy Show - but Homer is arrested, the kids are mischievous and the mechanised attractions go berserk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: $pringfield (Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Legalised Gambling)
programme.desc: Mr Burns decides to open a casino in Springfield, and it is not before long Marge is bitten by the gambling bug - much to the dismay of her family. Animated comedy, with the guest voices of Gerry Cooney and Robert Goulet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to community-owned B&B The Gun at Ridsdale. A visit to a birds of prey centre results in one guest's feathery hat getting some special attention

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals go glamping at the Marthrown of Mabie site tucked away in a forest in Dumfries, where hosts Mike and Pam hope their guests will embrace the off-grid experience. Unfortunately, Louise and Kerry quickly find the loos to be bog standard, and get buzzed off by some uninvited guests in their accommodation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals are in the village of Holmrook in Cumbria, where Jo and Craig host at their Dale View B&B. The scenery is spectacular, but Kerry and Louise can't dust off their cleanliness concerns. After an afternoon aboard a steam train touring the Cumbrian hills, the guests bond over a few drinks. But Jo is left kicking herself after a poached egg disaster the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to the Cross Inn in Heptonstall, West Yorkshire. Eccentric hosts Gig and Lyndsey hope to impress with their 'one-of-a-kind' style. The B&Bers take it easy with a canal boat tour of the nearby waterways, before they're served gin by a giant sloth at Gig's gig venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day arrives, and with some sore feelings festering, the B&Bers are ready to dish out the dirt on their competitors. Louise and Kerry want to know why Jo and Craig didn't like their B&B. Jo and Craig want to know why Louise and Kerry didn't like their B&B

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In Denmark, George meets a young couple tackling the enormous task of turning a derelict water pumping station into a luxury holiday home. Meanwhile, a dedicated outdoor swimmer builds himself a futurist micro camper. George and Will come up with a novel way to pick the colours for their elegant sky cabin, Will Hardie visits a glamping pod built in an upturned boat, and George visits one up a tree in a Danish forest

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In south London, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for a flat for first-time buyers Adam and Nicole, and a townhouse for world-record-holding rower Kat. Adam and Nicole live with their respective parents and need help to get them living together under the same roof but their home patch has become a pricey part of town, so they've saved for their entire adult lives to get a large enough deposit. They're nervous about spending all that hard-saved cash, but Kirstie manages to find them some hard-to-resist homes. In 2019 Kat was diagnosed with cancer. After going through chemotherapy and being told she was in remission she wanted a new focus, so she joined an all-female trio for an Atlantic rowing challenge. They beat the previous world record by more than seven days, and Kat's next challenge is to put down roots with a townhouse in her beloved south London. Even with a budget of over a million pounds, Phil finds it tough to hit everything on her wishlist in the top spots where she wants to live but once they manage to focus her search on Greenwich, things start to fall into place. A house with potential tugs at Kat's heart

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with Paul and Vic in the Yorkshire village of Clifford to see if they decided to sell their home or renovate it. Back in 2018, Kirstie and Phil visited to see if they could help the couple make a decision, providing them with a plan to renovate with their budget of £42,000 and showing them a number of other houses that would work well for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Staff and volunteers go to extremes to make a success of the railway's steam gala, transporting a 60-tonne locomotive more than 300 miles from the Isle of Wight to Yorkshire. Plus, a historic tram and a vintage steam crane are put into action

programme.title: Shergar: The Racehorse and the IRA
programme.desc: Investigation into the theft of the world's most valuable racehorse in 1983, and its place in the turbulent backdrop of the Troubles in Northern Ireland, when the IRA may have sought funds through ransom demands. Featuring first-hand accounts and compelling historical context to uncover the shocking collision of politics, crime and sport

programme.title: Wrath of Man (2021)
programme.desc: A newly employed security guard gets off to a rocky start with his colleagues, but when he uses exceptional marksmanship skills to foil a robbery, they are left wondering what his background really is. While they fear he may be an inside man for a criminal gang, his mission of revenge slowly comes to light. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Holt McCallany and Andy Garcia

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Lion (2016)
programme.desc: A five-year-old Indian boy is adopted by an Australian couple after getting lost hundreds of kilometers from home. 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family. Drama based on the biographical book A Long Way Home by Saroo Brierley, starring Dev Patel, Nicole Kidman and Rooney Mara

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Comedy starring Sam Campbell. A hotshot director scours the country for everyday people with feature film ideas before racing against the clock to turn the idea into reality in just three days. Sam and his elite team set about bringing Mick Hall's incomprehensible concept - featuring a detective and real snakes - to the big screen. But it turns out that some people don't make good actors, and snakes have a tendency to bite

programme.title: Make That Movie

But the shoot goes sideways when Pat makes moves on a wealthy resident, Winnie gets challenged to a fight and Jess discovers that she's truly terrible with old people

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug tries to get into Carrie's good books so she will let him take a trip to Las Vegas with his friends, and Arthur visits a casino. Kevin James stars, with Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie becomes a team leader at her new job, which entails working on Saturdays. A jealous Doug asks his own boss for a promotion too - but is not happy with what he is given. Meanwhile, Arthur suspects the pair of having fun without him. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug reluctantly agrees to join a support group for overeaters - but sneaks off to hide in an abusive relationship meeting instead. However, his scam is exposed when he not only gains weight, but becomes terrified of Carrie

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, causing Ray to wonder whether he is trying to avoid something. Determined to discover the truth, he deprives the youngster of television, comics and video games to sweat the answer out of him through sheer boredom

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray grow irritated by Robert and Amy's over-the-top displays of affection - especially when the pair start giving them relationship advice. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Gianni is hired to do some work on the kitchen, but infuriates Debra with his laziness. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Jon Manfrellotti and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink has to choose whether to return to his heartless former agent Bebe, or stick with his current representative, well-meaning but ineffectual Ben. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: The shrink takes everyone to a ski lodge for a weekend break, but wires are crossed and everyone gets the wrong impression about one another. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: Lilith (Bebe Neuwirth) arrives out of the blue and tries to rekindle her relationship with Frasier. He manages to resist her charms, but Niles is not as strong-willed. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Boyzone, Priya Kansara, Michael Ball, Celyn Jones and Anna Dimitriadis. With music from Freya Ridings

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend a confectionery convention, where they plan to make off with lots of free sweets. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Brothers Peter and David share a home in Wolverhampton and have decided to jointly buy a holiday home in the Spanish town of Torrevieja. With a budget of £100,000, they want a home that not only ticks all their boxes but also suits their large extended family too, so turn to Jean Johansson for advice

programme.title: Women's FA Cup
programme.sub-title: Brighton & Hove Albion v Manchester City
programme.desc: Brighton & Hove Albion v Manchester City (Kick-off 3.00pm). Jill Scott and Maisie Adam present all the action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium. Both teams came back from 2-0 down in their semi-finals to win 3-2, with Brighton prevailing thanks to Nadine Noordam's winner against Liverpool in the fifth minute of stoppage time. Bunny Shaw was the hero in her side's clash with Chelsea as the double-chasing Citizens left it even later, first sending the match into extra time and then scoring the decisive goal

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George follows more of the most eccentric, ambitious and passionate self-builders he's ever met. He also attempts to create an elegant airborne cabin from an old industrial scissor lift and heads to Denmark, home of gorgeous and minimalist architecture. In this episode, a young couple challenge themselves to fit a camper on the back of a tiny Italian Tuk-Tuk, and a father of two boys creates a quirky getaway in an abandoned nuclear bunker. Meanwhile, George and Will Hardie create lightweight furniture for their sky cabin, with mixed results

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond welcome Dermot O'Leary, Greg James, Fern Brady and Mel B to the tent, as they put their baking skills to the test, under the watchful eyes of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Discovery Princess cruisers enjoy Alaska's Endicott Arm fjord and a spot of whale watching, while the Diamond Princess passengers have a mindful meander to Busan's Buddhist temple. . Meanwhile, in Montenegro, another ship in the fleet has docked in Bar, where passengers travel by small boat from the historic coastal town of Perast to an iconic offshore islet that is home to a collection of spectacular artworks

programme.title: Tip Toe

programme.title: Gogglebox

Former Olympian Simon and 60-year-old stable manager Louise are both seeking love later in life, while disco queen Priscilla and bhangra-loving accountant Raj both want fun, but can their musical tastes mix? Twenty-three-year-old Jack is feeling nervous about his blind date and hopes he can find some common ground with Rachella

programme.desc: Amy invites her brother for dinner, but he ends up outstaying his welcome, forcing Robert to take desperate measures to eject him from the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: Ray and Debra begin telling lies in a bid to cover up previous falsehoods, but Marie soon suspects what they are doing. Comedy, with Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.desc: Phoebe is alarmed to learn she has attracted the unwanted attentions of a stalker, and Monica comes up with a plan to deal with her broodiness. American comedy, guest starring David Arquette, with Lisa Kudrow and Courteney Cox

programme.sub-title: The One with the Metaphorical Tunnel
programme.desc: Chandler ponders the importance of commitment, Monica starts work in a restaurant and Phoebe's home truths make her an unpopular choice as Joey's agent. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.desc: Actress Isabella Rossellini makes Ross's day by dropping into Central Perk for a coffee. Phoebe's efforts to introduce her half-brother to the city give him the wrong idea about her line of work. Comedy, with David Schwimmer, Lisa Kudrow and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.desc: Janice persuades the pals to reveal their deepest, darkest secrets about a period in their relationships three years earlier. programme.sub-title: The One with the Race Car Bed

programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Remember Which Sister

programme.sub-title: The One with All the Jealousy

Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito

They then head off for a bike ride - but what Barney forgets to mention to his dad is that they are riding on a tightrope 25 metres in the air

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's former singing partner turns up with the idea of using Smelly Cat in a commercial. Chandler dates a woman with a prosthetic leg, and Ross's jealousy gets the better of him. Sherilyn Fenn guest stars

programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: A harassed Rachel tells Ross she thinks they should take a break from each other - so he responds by getting drunk and sleeping with a woman Joey and Chandler have been chasing. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.desc: Ross tries to prevent Rachel discovering he slept with Chloe from the photocopying shop, but she finds out anyway and a major argument ensues at her apartment. Trapped in Monica's bedroom, the other friends cannot help overhearing everything

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Private Benjamin (1980)
programme.desc: A scatterbrained society woman looks for a change of pace after her husband dies on their wedding night, and is tricked by a duplicitous recruiter into enlisting in the army. In spite of the initial culture shock and conflict with her tough commanding officer, she gradually finds direction and self-esteem for the first time in her life. Upon completion of basic training, she meets a dashing French doctor, who is in Biloxi for a medical conference. They part ways after a brief romance but it is not long before she must decide between her Army career or love. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Armand Assante, Eileen Brennan, Harry Dean Stanton, Sam Wanamaker and Barbara Barrie

However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones are the five phenoms who have willingly submitted to the toughest physical and mental examination on television, as Taskmaster returns for an 18th series. But will their attempts to defuse a large robot, push a golden envelope or simply count some chairs impress the Taskmaster, Greg Davies? In the first episode, Greg and his faultlessly loyal assistant Alex Horne welcome five fairly fresh bodies for a crack at TV's greatest prize: Greg's disembodied head, painted gold and stuck to a plinth. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones attempt to impress the Taskmaster by searching for a seal, hurling yoga balls in a theme park, and force-feeding Alex a bowlful of bubblegum

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former footballer Steven hopes to give his demanding fiancee Kayleigh the Wag wedding of her dreams, and arranges for the nuptials to take place at Thorpe Park in Surrey . However, plans for a pre-ceremony ride on an 80mph rollercoaster and a reception at the nearby conference centre fail to meet the bride's high standards

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Joe DiDomizio, CEO of travel retailer Hudson Group, goes undercover to ensure the company is fighting fit for the future. The businessman hopes to find that the company's vow to be 'the traveller's best friend' is being upheld by his employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the Larry H Miller Group of Companies and co-owner of National Basketball Association team the Utah Jazz, goes undercover. Since his father died he has made many changes to the organisation, and posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition to win a dream job, he works among his own staff to see if his dad's legacy still lives on

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits Meson de Mesilla, a Tuscan-style hotel in Las Cruces, New Mexico. Owner and former child-star Cali Szczawinski purchased the hotel so she could perform Cher songs every night to a captive audience, but Gordon investigates whether she may be falling flat when it comes to the needs of her guests because she's too busy trying to hit the high notes on stage

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotel's fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: In Oregon, Gordon Ramsay tries to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around $1million in debt. The chef questions whether owner Richard Davis's interest in smoking cannabis is distracting him from the problems at this family-built inn, and encounters Richard's sons Duke and Dusty, whose fiery relationship seems to prevent them from working together to tackle the establishment's financial troubles

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Starkville, Mississippi, to try to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. Despite having more than 40 years' experience in the business, owner David Mollendor is at a loss as to how to make his dream of owning his own hotel work, while his wife Sukie is struggling as its chef, tackling the role without any formal catering experience. Gordon discovers a family tragedy that explains why this couple have become trapped in their business and wrestling with debt

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits a dog-friendly hotel in West Dover, Vermont, that is in urgent need of help. Owner Sandy MacDougall runs the Four Seasons Inn like a hostel, with unpaid staff staying in the rooms instead of paying guests. The acerbic chef aims to get the business back on track before Sandy loses everything, but wonders whether it would be kinder to simply put this dog-friendly hotel to sleep

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Lee Mack and Joe Wilkinson take on Jon Richardson and Jessica Knappett. Comedian Nigel Ng is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Russell Howard & Mum
programme.desc: The comedian and his mum venture south to Atlanta, Georgia, where they attempt to master the four elements of hip-hop under the guidance of local legend Dr Dax

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 27-year-old man from Essex hopes to give his fiancee and former boss in the Navy the wedding of her dreams. However, he is torn between the wishes of the bride, who wants him to take charge of organising the ceremony, and his best man, who encourages him to take a more laid-back approach to the task and return to the laddish ways of his past

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 30-year-old Newcastle man hopes to give his 26-year-old art-teacher fiancee the wedding of her dreams. The couple have been inseparable since they met five years ago while working behind a bar, but the groom's love of science fiction is at odds with the bride's sophisticated tastes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Anna, a 31-year-old support worker from Liverpool hopes to give her fiancee Sian the ceremony of her dreams. However, she struggles to set aside her tomboy tendencies and adapt to the feminine world of wedding planning, and best woman Jade threatens to be more of a hindrance than a help

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Former participants Amit Kleinberger, Randy DeWitt and Steve Greenbaum want to take another look at the everyday workings of their businesses, but fear they will be recognised. They each send an employee in their place to report on how their firms are functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. He aims to discover whether his fast-growing company is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible, but his secret identity is jeopardised when he encounters a colleague he has met on a previous occasion

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kicking off the competition in Edinburgh are young lovebirds Andy and Pim, who are hoping to impress their guests with a Scottish and Thai-themed menu - with a bit of American thrown in for good measure. On the second night, the group learns more about Jimmy and Jas's fairy-tale first encounter, as well as Jimmy's fledgling modelling career, which surprises everyone. Night three sees a bromance between Andy and Stuart blossom, and everyone needs an open mind when they sample plumber Stuart and hairdresser Jack's experimental menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glasgow pair Jean and Ron hope their 'taste of Scotland' menu will impress their guests. Day two sees Colin and Craig try to claw back the limelight and jolly up the mood

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sussex, childhood sweethearts Jemma and James kick off with a menu based on their unlikely romance, finding a cold soup starter divides opinions. On day two, soon-to-be-retired dinner party veterans Phil and Sue cook up a menu of home comfort food, but disaster strikes in the dessert. On the final day, critical Steve and Aaron prepare a pescatarian feast with a fish-shaped salmon Wellington. Once again James and Jemma have to defend their relationship due to their less than romantic behaviour

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Murphy's Historic Hotel near Sacramento in northern California, where owners Brian, Kevin and Joel are often too distracted by their lively bar to look after their business. The national landmark, which has played host to an array of famous names including Mark Twain, President Ulysses S Grant and JP Morgan, has no dedicated accommodation manager, so guests sometimes struggle to receive the attention they need and end up feeling the hotel has become an afterthought beside the noisy saloon

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Connecticut's oldest inn, the Curtis House in Woodbury, which has been owned by the Hardisty family for generations. However, the business has started to fall apart and their legacy is on the brink of being lost. Siblings Chris and TJ, who are in charge, no longer speak to each other and the staff and guests feel stuck in the middle

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Pipestone, Minnesota, where he checks in to Historic Calumet Inn. Joint owners Vanda and Rina Smrkovski were given the hotel as a gift by their father, but after just nine months in charge, their staff are on the brink of revolt, and guests are expressing their dissatisfaction with the accommodation. Gordon quickly realises the sisters need to grow up fast if he's going to have a chance of saving the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Angler's Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isn't what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. In a departure from the generally friendly tone of the show, Alex Horne and Joel Dommett trade insults across tasks. But name-calling is the least of the Taskmaster's worries as he witnesses Joanna Page doing something startling with a pineapple, Armando Iannucci doing something confusing with a nursery rhyme and Amy Gledhill doing something unexpected with balls of ice. Meanwhile, Kumail Nanjiani reveals something unusual about his body

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jade, 24, sits down for a meal with Jak, 29, a yoga lover in touch with his spiritual side and who shares her love of exercise and tattoos, while fashion stylist Christine, 70, and entrepreneur Peter, 71, share stories of the Swinging Sixties. programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart grows frustrated by Homer's lack of interest in him and sets out to search for a new father figure. Lisa tries to break her addiction to an expensive teenage chat-line, but finds it harder than expected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa schemes to get her own back on Bart for destroying the prize tomato she grew for a science project. Meanwhile, Homer is arrested for drink-driving and finds himself having to attend Alcoholics Anonymous meetings

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: At the Springfield library, Marge stimulates the children's interest in history by relating extraordinary tales featuring the wives of Henry VIII, the Lewis and Clark expedition and the early life of Austrian composer Mozart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse moves to Capital City with his mother, forcing Bart to look for new friends - but he finds himself bonding more strongly with Lisa. Meanwhile, Homer resorts to begging to raise money for Marge's anniversary gift

programme.title: The Simpsons

First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. programme.title: Modern Family

American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. programme.title: Modern Family

Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jade, 24, sits down for a meal with Jak, 29, a yoga lover in touch with his spiritual side and who shares her love of exercise and tattoos, while fashion stylist Christine, 70, and entrepreneur Peter, 71, share stories of the Swinging Sixties. Health club manager Donna, 51, is a born romantic with old fashioned values at heart and her date is 53-year-old stetson-wearing Simon from Dallas, Texas, who's happy to stand out from the crowd and is looking for a strong woman to stand by his side

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's the end-of-agency party, and a surprise from the agents tests the strength of the connections that the celebrities and their dates have formed. Professor Green takes the mic for a performance to remember

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is pitted against a rival mother when she tries to micro-manage Barry and Erica's search for college places, while Erica tells Pops that she has tried to enhance her prospects by lying about her extracurricular activities. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Bride Lauren and music-mad Perry are under the spotlight as they regroup with best man Michael and bridesmaid Leigh to relive their gig-themed wedding at The Forum, Kentish Town

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon in Panama and are immediately brought back to earth with a bump when they move in together and start facing the challenges of real life. Also, a heated argument could prove disastrous for one couple's budding wedded bliss

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer has a heart attack but cannot afford proper medical care, so dodgy doctor Nick Riviera offers to perform a cut-price triple-bypass operation. Cartoon capers, with the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Hank Azaria

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sets out to halt the plans of an unscrupulous businessman intending to defraud Springfield's residents by supplying them with a defective monorail system. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma decides to take her Aunt Gladys's advice and start a family - but a day in charge of Bart and Lisa at a beer-themed amusement park soon changes her mind

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart grows frustrated by Homer's lack of interest in him and sets out to search for a new father figure. Lisa tries to break her addiction to an expensive teenage chat-line, but finds it harder than expected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa schemes to get her own back on Bart for destroying the prize tomato she grew for a science project. Meanwhile, Homer is arrested for drink-driving and finds himself having to attend Alcoholics Anonymous meetings

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: At the Springfield library, Marge stimulates the children's interest in history by relating extraordinary tales featuring the wives of Henry VIII, the Lewis and Clark expedition and the early life of Austrian composer Mozart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse moves to Capital City with his mother, forcing Bart to look for new friends - but he finds himself bonding more strongly with Lisa. Meanwhile, Homer resorts to begging to raise money for Marge's anniversary gift

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stages a revival of a musical from high school, but her pleasant memories are threatened by the return of an old rival

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Grampa falls victim to a phone scam, the rest of the Simpsons set out to get his money back. With the guest voice of Alan Cumming

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another selection of spooky stories, including parodies of Bambi and Parasite, and a tale of a tree coming to life after Homer chops it down

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: Dog (2022)
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Briggs is determined to regain his place at Joint Base Lewis-McChord in Washington. His superior officer agrees to return him to the fold if he can successfully escort a military working dog named Lulu along America's Pacific Coast to attend the funeral of her handler. Comedy, co-directed by and starring Channing Tatum

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments of series seven, featuring a rolling cast of famous faces as they tune into the best TV on the box. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Our Dementia Choir Sings Again with Vicky McClure, First Dates Hotel, My Possessed Pet, This Morning, The Ex-Wife and Sue Perkins: Perfectly Legal. Plus, thoughts on ITV News' of possible power shortages. First shown in October 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dina, 39, is keen to settle down and start a family, but her date, 41-year-old Stephen, is a born adventurer who has climbed the Matterhorn and swum oceans. Will he run a mile when she shares her intentions with him? Margaret, 73, hasn't been on a date for 44 years and is looking for a family man who shares her love of music and life, while art student Rachel, meets vegan singer-songwriter and self-confessed hippie Hari

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire's plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes insecure about her size after she and Bart contract a bizarre infection that requires treatment from steroids that cause temporary weight gain

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Portrait of a Lackey on Fire

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: It's the grand finale, and in Kuala Lumpur, the top three teams are put to the ultimate test using skills they've perfected during the race so far. They're tasked with recreating a dessert with help from a python, hunting for a treasure map in a bookstore, and making their way to the other side of the city by any means possible. The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Bad Sisters, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, The Kardashians, Super/Natural, Emma Willis: Delivering Babies, and A Trip to Infinity, as well as BBC News reports on the energy cap and a U-turn by Kwasi Kwarteng. First broadcast in October 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. Meanwhile, 30-year-old financial manager J meets aesthetic therapist Sophie, and 23-year-old Nathan has his work cut out to try and win over 21-year-old Morganne

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: James Martin: Delicious
programme.desc: The chef prepares adds watercress to a selection of dishes, including red onion and creme fraiche pizza, scallop salad, and Stilton soup

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 2019 edition of the culinary competition begins with cake week and the first stage challenge features a fruit cake, while the technical is a retro classic that requires intricate decoration. Finally, for the showstopper, the contestants must create the birthday cake they wish they had received as a child. Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith doing the judging

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the second round of the culinary competition, which this time focuses on biscuits. For the signature round, the contestants must concoct a luxurious chocolate-coated bake. The technical challenge is a nostalgic one for Paul Hollywood, who asks the contestants to prepare a snack that was a favourite of his father's. Finally, the showstopper round requires the bakers to rise to an eye-catching challenge that is designed to test which of them will snap under the pressure

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the third stage of the culinary competition, with judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. Bread week has arrived, and the remaining bakers face the challenge of proving their worth with Paul's speciality. First, the contestants must prepare a signature bake that is designed to be shared, while the ingredients for a popular summer staple are lurking beneath the gingham cloth in the technical challenge. Finally, an ambitious showstopper will test their steady hands and artistic flair

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host dairy week, with Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood judging the bakers' efforts. The first of the three challenges is a decorative signature bake that involves a tricky turn-out. The bakers then move onto the technical, which is a complex recipe with a long history that dates back to Henry VIII. With the first day behind them, the contestants regroup for the final challenge of the week - an intricate showstopper usually found at the centre of Indian weddings

programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge is in her own kitchen to give step-by-step instructions for recipes for everyday meals and special occasions. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man with a deep cut to the head refuses to go to hospital for fear that he won't come out again. A homeless man is in agony with spasms in his back, and a 12-year-old girl with epilepsy has a seizure, but her mother still wants her to go to school

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Two families come to terms with life-changing events, including the relatives of eight-year-old Junior, who has an open leg fracture and suspected internal bleeding after being knocked off his bike by a car. His mum Bekki reveals how Junior learned to cope with extraordinary setbacks and how she worries about his future because of health problems of her own. Meanwhile, 46-year-old Anthony arrives in A&E after suffering chest pains during a day out at the races. As doctors attempt to get to the bottom of what's causing his dangerously high heart rate, his wife discusses how Anthony's awareness of his mortality was increased by losing his father

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Greg, 47, is airlifted to St George's with critical injuries to his arm and leg after being knocked off his motorbike on the way into work. As his wife Lucie rushes to his bedside, she's shocked by what she finds.
